description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with short sleeves and a combination of screen print and flock print on the chestFittingComfortWash care Machine wash warm Wash with like colours only Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry low Do not iron if decorated Do not dry clean if decorated Feel like a Kryptonian in this black superman tee. The graphic on the front depicts superman in a classic stance - getting ready to fly for an encounter – and invests this tee with his power! Pair it with sneakers and light denims for a stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'; Shoulders-19"
